_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to describe a government institution or system and explain why it matters to our community.

_source.w: We are learning to describe a government institution or system and explain why it matters to our community.
y: Understanding institutions helps us see how our community is organised and governed.
Being able to explain how government works means we can participate in it more effectively.
Knowing about civic institutions helps us appreciate the services they provide.
eg: Describing what our local council does and the services it provides.
Explaining how local government is chosen through democratic elections.
Drawing a diagram showing the role of one government body and how it helps people.
Presenting facts about a civic institution to the class.
Comparing our local council with a council in another area.
Discussing why having a local government is important for our community.
